member.name: M:BDF.DVDCentral.API.Controllers.CustomerController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BDF.DVDCentral.API.Controllers.CustomerController},Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.DbContextOptions{BDF.DVDCentral.PL.Data.DVDCentralEntities})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the CustomerController class with the specified logger and database context options.
member.remarks: This constructor is intended for use with dependency injection to supply the required services for the controller.
member.param: The logger used to record diagnostic and operational information for the CustomerController. Cannot be null.
The options used to configure the DVDCentralEntities database context, including connection settings. Cannot be null.

member.name: M:BDF.DVDCentral.API.Controllers.GenericController`3.Get
member.summary: Get all records of type T from the database and return as JSON

member.name: M:BDF.DVDCentral.API.Controllers.GenericController`3.Get(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves the resource of type T identified by the specified unique identifier.
member.remarks: If the resource is not found, a 404 Not Found response is returned. If an internal error occurs, a 500 Internal Server Error response is returned with the error message.
member.param: The unique identifier of the resource to retrieve. Must be a valid GUID.
member.returns: An ActionResult containing the requested resource of type T if found; otherwise, a 404 Not Found response or a 500 Internal Server Error response.

member.name: M:BDF.DVDCentral.API.Controllers.GenericController`3.Post(`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Inserts a new entity into the system and returns its unique identifier.
member.remarks: If the insertion fails, a 500 Internal Server Error status code is returned along with the error message.
member.param: The entity to be inserted into the system. This parameter cannot be null.
Specifies whether to roll back the transaction if an error occurs. Defaults to .
member.returns: An ActionResult containing a dictionary with the unique identifier of the inserted entity.

member.name: M:BDF.DVDCentral.API.Controllers.GenericController`3.Put(System.Guid,`0,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Given a unique identifier and an entity, updates the corresponding record in the database. If the update is successful, returns the number of rows affected as a JSON response. If an error occurs during the update process, returns a 500 Internal Server Error status code along with the error message. The optional rollback parameter allows for rolling back the transaction in case of an error, ensuring data integrity.

member.name: M:BDF.DVDCentral.API.Controllers.GenericController`3.Delete(System.Guid,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Given a unique identifier and an entity, deletes the corresponding record in the database. If the delete is successful, returns the number of rows affected as a JSON response. If an error occurs during the update process, returns a 500 Internal Server Error status code along with the error message. The optional rollback parameter allows for rolling back the transaction in case of an error, ensuring data integrity.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a type. Example: T:Namespace.Outer+Inner`1 becomes T:Namespace.Outer.Inner`1

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.PropertyInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName or for an indexer P:Namespace.ContainingType.Item(System.Int32)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Type,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a property given its container type and property name. Example: P:Namespace.ContainingType.PropertyName

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.CreateDocumentationId(System.Reflection.MethodInfo)
member.summary: Generates a documentation comment ID for a method (or constructor). For example: M:Namespace.ContainingType.MethodName(ParamType1,ParamType2)~ReturnType M:Namespace.ContainingType.#ctor(ParamType)

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.GetTypeDocId(System.Type,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Generates a documentation ID string for a type. This method handles nested types (replacing '+' with '.'), generic types, arrays, pointers, by-ref types, and generic parameters. The flag controls whether constructed generic type arguments are emitted, while controls whether the generic arity marker (e.g. "`1") is appended.

member.name: M:Microsoft.AspNetCore.OpenApi.Generated.DocumentationCommentIdHelper.NormalizeDocId(System.String)
member.summary: Normalizes a documentation comment ID to match the compiler-style format. Strips the return type suffix for ordinary methods but retains it for conversion operators.
member.param: The documentation comment ID to normalize.
